## Summary

Describe the user-visible outcome and the technical change.

## Validation

- [ ] I added or updated tests appropriate to this change.
- [ ] I ran the relevant formatter, linter, and tests.
- [ ] I updated documentation, schemas, or ADRs affected by this change.

## Architecture and Privacy

- [ ] This change preserves module boundaries and stable interfaces, or documents an approved change to them.
- [ ] This change keeps cloud functionality optional and local operation available where applicable.
- [ ] This change does not log, commit, or expose conversations, memories, prompts, credentials, embeddings, or access tokens.
- [ ] This change does not autonomously send messages, impersonate users without approval, or make social decisions for users.

## Review Notes

List migrations, compatibility considerations, rollout steps, or known limitations.
